title: Peach Arcadia
description: Add a new biome -- Peach Forest into Minecraft
body:
# Peach Arcadia  |  桃花源

**Peach Arcadia** is a mod that adds **Peach Forest** for Minecraft Forge 1.20.1 

## Features:

- A unique biome with peach trees, flowers, structure
- make tools, foods with peach wood, peach flower and so on
- Chinese style decorations and structures

## Screenshots:
![peach forest](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1b0be79efe1dd95bba35df83159a57e8287b69cc.jpeg)

  The mod is currently being updated, you can contact me at 3230944084@qq.com for bugs or ideas
